display_name: Benzo[a]pyrene oral slope factor - Protocol 28 lead
applicability: Protocol 28 Appendix 8A human-health soil TRV lead for benzo(a)pyrene. Candidate only; direct canonical source check is pending before use as a calculator default.
uncertainty: Protocol 28 crystallization date is 2015-11-30; original-source currentness and exact source locator are pending.
review_notes: Listed in Protocol 28 Appendix 8A as an SFO for benzo(a)pyrene. Treat Protocol 28 as a policy compilation and source-mining lead, not the canonical scientific source.

evidence_items.locator: Appendix 8A, PDF page 96, benzo(a)pyrene row
evidence_items.note: Original source and current value must be checked directly before promotion.

bc_protocol_basis: Protocol 28 Appendix 8A provides the compiled value; Protocol 1 v5.0 is the target hierarchy for 2027 standards work.

source_relationships.note: BC policy compilation showing a TRV value and source hierarchy; original source pending direct check.

display_name: Fish ingestion rate - subsistence fisher (BC WLRS 2023)
applicability: BC subsistence fisher adult fish ingestion rate (WLRS 2023, Table 2; = Health Canada consumption rate for Indigenous Groups in Canada). Substance-independent exposure factor (substance_key=generic). needs_review candidate; not a calculator default.
uncertainty: Secondary citation pending direct-source verification against the WLRS 2023 primary. Unit kg/day is intentionally fail-closed for Evidence Library unit-normalization (the normalizer does not normalize kg/day); value_text records both g/day and kg/day.
